subcodes.first_line: This is the Book of Utterance which the All-Merciful hath sent down from the Kingdom of mystic knowledge unto them that have believed in Him in His days and have testified unto that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب البیان انزله الرحمن من ملکوت العرفان لمن آمن به فی ایامه و شهد بما
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @presence of; reunion with God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @Word of God and human limitations, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
